step_rationale: G-protein subunit mediating excitatory platelet signaling (thrombin receptor PAR1/PAR4).
mechanism: GNA12/13-coupled pathways drive shape change and aggregation responses to thrombin and other platelet agonists.

references.title: Role of heterotrimeric G proteins in platelet activation and clot formation in platelets treated with integrin αIIbβ3 inhibitor.
